product_overview: ApartmentManagement is a multi-tenant apartment management backend for super admins, tenant admins, and residents. It provides JWT-based authentication plus CRUD and workflow APIs for tenants, buildings, apartments, residents, dues, announcements, meetings, maintenance tickets, and dashboard reporting.
core_goals: Support secure phone-based authentication with JWT access and refresh token rotation
Enable SuperAdmin management of tenants across the platform
Enable TenantAdmin management of buildings, apartments, residents, announcements, decisions, meetings, dues, and maintenance operations within a tenant boundary
Allow Residents to view their own dues, acknowledge announcements, and create or discuss maintenance tickets
Enforce multi-tenant isolation through TenantId-based filtering and role authorization
Provide summary and analytics endpoints for tenant administration and operational visibility
Expose health check endpoints for deployment and monitoring

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Handles phone-based login, token refresh/logout, password changes, profile lookup, tenant admin registration, and invite acceptance.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with valid telefon and sifre -> Receive 200 with accessToken, refreshToken, and user profile -> GET /api/v1.0/auth/me with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with current user profile

POST /api/v1.0/auth/refresh with valid refreshToken -> Receive 200 with new accessToken and rotated refreshToken -> POST /api/v1.0/auth/logout with Bearer accessToken and refreshToken -> Receive 200 confirming logout
POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with invalid sifre -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with authentication error payload
POST /api/v1.0/auth/refresh with revoked or reused refreshToken -> Receive 401 Unauthorized due to invalid token rotation state

POST /api/v1.0/auth/change-password with Bearer accessToken and valid eskiSifre, yeniSifre, yeniSifreTekrar -> Receive 200 confirming password update and token revocation -> POST /api/v1.0/auth/refresh with old refreshToken -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Tenants API
features.description: Supports SuperAdmin tenant lifecycle management, activation control, detail lookup, and statistics reporting.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with SuperAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/tenants with valid tenant data and Bearer accessToken -> Receive 201/200 with created tenant -> GET /api/v1.0/tenants with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with tenant list -> GET /api/v1.0/tenants/{id}/statistics with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with tenant statistics
POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/tenants with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because role is not SuperAdmin

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with SuperAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> PATCH /api/v1.0/tenants/{id}/active-status with Bearer accessToken and valid payload -> Receive 200 with updated active state -> DELETE /api/v1.0/tenants/{id} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 confirming soft delete

features.name: Buildings API
features.description: Manages tenant-scoped building records and retrieval of apartments within a building.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/buildings with Bearer accessToken and building details -> Receive 201/200 with created building -> GET /api/v1.0/buildings/{id} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with building details -> GET /api/v1.0/buildings/{id}/apartments with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with apartment list

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/buildings with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because Residents cannot manage buildings

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/buildings/{id} for a building from another tenant -> Receive 404 Not Found due to tenant isolation/filtering

features.name: Apartments API
features.description: Provides apartment CRUD, batch creation, and related queries for residents and dues.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/apartments with Bearer accessToken and apartment details -> Receive 201/200 with created apartment -> POST /api/v1.0/apartments/batch with Bearer accessToken and a list of apartments -> Receive 200 with batch creation result -> GET /api/v1.0/apartments/{id}/residents with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with resident list

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/apartments with missing buildingId or invalid occupancyStatus -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/apartments/{id}/dues with Bearer accessToken for another tenant's apartment -> Receive 404 Not Found due to tenant filtering

features.name: Residents API
features.description: Allows TenantAdmins to manage resident records and generate user invitations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/residents with Bearer accessToken and resident details -> Receive 201/200 with created resident -> GET /api/v1.0/residents/{id} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with resident profile -> POST /api/v1.0/residents/{id}/user-invite with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with invite token or invitation result

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/residents with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because Residents cannot create resident records

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/residents/{id} for a resident in another tenant -> Receive 404 Not Found due to tenant isolation

features.name: Dues API
features.description: Manages membership fees, payment records, overdue tracking, reporting, and resident self-service dues views.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/dues with Bearer accessToken and due details -> Receive 201/200 with created due -> POST /api/v1.0/dues/{id}/payments with Bearer accessToken and payment details -> Receive 200 with payment recorded -> GET /api/v1.0/dues/{id}/payments with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with payment history -> GET /api/v1.0/dues/report with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with monthly report

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/dues/resident/me with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with resident dues list -> GET /api/v1.0/dues/{id} for another resident's due -> Receive 404 Not Found or access denied based on tenant isolation
POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/dues with malformed amount or dueDate -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> DELETE /api/v1.0/dues/payments/{paymentId} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 confirming payment reversal

features.name: Decisions API
features.description: Supports board decision creation, updates, deletion, listing, and lookup by decision number.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/decisions with Bearer accessToken and decision data -> Receive 201/200 with created decision -> GET /api/v1.0/decisions/{id} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with decision details -> GET /api/v1.0/decisions/decision-number/{decisionNumber} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with matching decision

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/decisions with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because Residents cannot manage decisions

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/decisions/{id} for a decision from another tenant -> Receive 404 Not Found due to tenant isolation

features.name: Announcements API
features.description: Enables tenant announcements, updates, deletions, read tracking, and read statistics for TenantAdmins and Residents.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/announcements with Bearer accessToken and announcement content -> Receive 201/200 with created announcement -> GET /api/v1.0/announcements/{id} with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with announcement details -> POST /api/v1.0/announcements/{id}/read with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 confirming read status

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/announcements with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with visible announcements -> POST /api/v1.0/announcements/{id}/read with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 confirming announcement read

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/announcements with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because Residents cannot create announcements

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/announcements/{id}/read-statistics with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with read statistics

features.name: Meetings API
features.description: Manages meeting scheduling, participant attendance, and minute summaries for tenant boards.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/meetings with Bearer accessToken and meeting details -> Receive 201/200 with created meeting -> GET /api/v1.0/meetings/{id}/participants with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with participant list -> PUT /api/v1.0/meetings/{id}/minutes with Bearer accessToken and minutesSummary -> Receive 200 confirming minutes saved

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/meetings with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because Residents cannot manage meetings

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> PUT /api/v1.0/meetings/{id}/participants/{participantId} with Bearer accessToken and attendanceStatus -> Receive 200 confirming attendance update -> GET /api/v1.0/meetings/{id} -> Receive 404 if meeting belongs to another tenant

features.name: Maintenance Tickets API
features.description: Supports creation, tracking, prioritization, commenting, and retrieval of maintenance tickets for residents and tenant admins.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets with Bearer accessToken and ticket details -> Receive 201/200 with created ticket -> POST /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets/{id}/comment with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 confirming comment -> GET /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets/{id}/comments with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with comment history

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with ticket list -> PATCH /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets/{id}/status with Bearer accessToken and status update -> Receive 200 confirming status change -> PATCH /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets/{id}/priority with Bearer accessToken and priority update -> Receive 200 confirming priority change

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> PATCH /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets/{id}/status with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because only TenantAdmins can update status

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> POST /api/v1.0/maintenance-tickets with missing title or invalid priority -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: Dashboard API
features.description: Provides dashboard summary cards, fee trend analytics, and recent activity feeds for tenant administration.
user_flows: POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with TenantAdmin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/dashboard/summary with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with summary metrics -> GET /api/v1.0/dashboard/membership-fee-trend with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with chart data -> GET /api/v1.0/dashboard/recent-activities with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 200 with recent activity feed

POST /api/v1.0/auth/login with Resident credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer tokens -> GET /api/v1.0/dashboard/summary with Bearer accessToken -> Receive 403 Forbidden because dashboard is TenantAdmin only

features.name: Health Checks
features.description: Exposes anonymous liveness and readiness probes for monitoring and deployment validation.
user_flows: GET /health/live بدون authentication -> Receive 200 indicating liveness -> GET /health/ready without authentication -> Receive 200 indicating readiness
GET /health/live without authentication during service failure -> Receive 503 or non-200 readiness/liveness failure response depending on hosting state
